title: Home Screen - Disconnecting/Connecting one earbud at a time
scenario: Home Screen correctly greys out individual earbud image and battery indicator when one earbud is disconnected while maintaining "Connected" status
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Ensure both earbuds (Left and Right) are connected and the device status shows "Connected".
3. Place the Right earbud into the charge case to disconnect it.
4. Observe the Home screen display for the Right earbud.
5. Observe the Home screen display for the Left earbud.
6. Observe the overall device connection status.
7. Remove the Right earbud from the charge case to reconnect it.
8. Place the Left earbud into the charge case to disconnect it.
9. Observe the Home screen display for the Left earbud.
10. Observe the Home screen display for the Right earbud.
11. Observe the overall device connection status.
12. Remove the Left earbud from the charge case to reconnect it.
13. Place both earbuds (Left and Right) into the charge case to disconnect them.
14. Observe the Home screen display for both earbuds.
15. Observe the overall device connection status.
16. Remove one earbud (e.g., Right) from the charge case to reconnect it.
17. Observe the Home screen display for the reconnected earbud.
18. Observe the Home screen display for the still-disconnected earbud.
19. Observe the overall device connection status.
expected: - When one earbud is disconnected: only that earbud's image and battery indicator are greyed out; the other earbud remains displayed as connected; overall device status still shows "Connected".\n- When both earbuds are disconnected: both earbud images and battery indicators are greyed out; connection status changes to "Disconnected".\n- When one earbud reconnects while the other is still disconnected: the reconnected earbud's image and battery indicator are restored; the other remains greyed out; overall device status changes to "Connected".
